tasks.description: Initialize FastAPI backend application with basic configuration, CORS middleware, and root health check endpoint.
Define SQLAlchemy models for Companies, FinancialTransactions, EmissionFactors, and ESGReports to establish the database schema.
Implement the AI Categorization service using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to map financial spend descriptions to EXIOBASE emission categories.
Build the Carbon Calculation engine that applies emission factors to categorized spend data to estimate Scope 1, 2, and 3 CO2e.
Create API endpoints for ingesting financial data (mocking Codat/Plaid) and retrieving calculated carbon footprints per category.
Initialize Next.js 14 frontend with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and the basic App Router structure including a RootLayout.
Develop a multi-step 'TurboTax style' Wizard component for collecting qualitative ESG disclosure data from SMB users.
Implement the main Analytics Dashboard page showing carbon footprint summaries, trends, and spend-based insights.
Create the 'Sustainability Passport' public/shared view allowing SMBs to display their verified ESG credentials to enterprise customers.
Implement the Report Generation service in the backend to produce formatted Markdown and PDF reports based on CSRD and GRI standards.
Develop API endpoints for generating, listing, and downloading ESG reports and their associated audit evidence.
Create a comprehensive README.md with setup instructions, API documentation overview, and environment variable requirements for the full stack.
